output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? 5 TikTok Hooks to Demand It Back
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your security deposit? These viral TikTok hooks expose illegal deductions—plus a $19.99 demand letter that gets your money back in 60 seconds.
content_outline: The Security Deposit Trap: Why Landlords Get Away With Withholding
TikTok Hook #1: The Fake Cleaning Fee Receipt (What Can Landlord Deduct?)
TikTok Hook #2: The Deadline Countdown (Security Deposit Not Returned)
TikTok Hook #3: The Wall of Ghosted Texts (My Landlord Won't Give Me My Deposit Back)
TikTok Hook #4: The Deduction Myth-Buster (Can Landlord Keep Security Deposit?)
TikTok Hook #5: The 60-Second Flip (From Frustrated Tenant to Paid Tenant)
From Views to Victory: Send the Letter That Actually Works
Know Your Tenant Rights: Security Deposit Laws by State
key_points: HOOK 1 — The Receipt Shock: 'POV: Your landlord charged you $400 for cleaning.' [Visual: Split screen of move-out photo vs. receipt.] Text overlay: 'That's normal wear and tear. You can't deduct this.' Script: 'I paid $19.99 for a demand letter and got every penny back.'

HOOK 2 — The Deadline: 'It's day 31 and your security deposit still hasn't been returned.' [Visual: Calendar flip with angry red marker.] Text overlay: 'In my state, they only had 21 days. Now they owe me double.' Script: 'Stop waiting. Start demanding.'

HOOK 3 — The Ghosting: 'My landlord won't give me my deposit back, so here's every ignored text.' [Visual: Screenshots flying in rapid fire.] Text overlay: 'Since he loves ghosting, I sent him a letter he can't ignore. 60 seconds. No subscription.'

HOOK 4 — The Myth-Buster: 'Can a landlord keep your security deposit for this?' [Visual: Nail hole / scuffed floor.] Text overlay: 'No. No. Also no.' Script: 'Here's what they can legally deduct. Spoiler: it's way less than they think.'

HOOK 5 — The Transformation: 'Before: begging for my deposit. After: Deposits-Back.com.' [Visual: Split screen, sad face vs. bank notification.] Script: 'Stop posting and start getting paid. Demand your deposits back in 60 seconds.'
output.cta: Stop begging and start getting paid. Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds. Just $19.99. No sign-up. No subscription. Just your money back.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters ages 18-35 who are active on TikTok and Instagram Reels, are problem-aware that their landlord is wrongfully withholding or deducting their security deposit, and want a fast, affordable legal tool to demand repayment without hiring a lawyer.
